top_signals.title: Crude Oil Plunges, Tech Rebounds to Set Up S&P 500 Rally
top_signals.summary: Stocks extended their gains, with tech rebounding from Tuesday’s sharp global selloff, as traders bet that a combination of dropping oil prices and weak housing-market data will ease the pressure on the Federal Reserve to hike interest rates.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Law enforcement groups warn Clarity Act could hinder crypto crime investigations
top_signals.summary: A provision in the Clarity Act could make it harder for law enforcement to investigate illicit crypto activity, the groups said.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Trump cancels signing of housing bill with CBDC ban
top_signals.summary: The 21st Century ROAD to Housing Act included a provision that the US Federal Reserve was barred from issuing or creating a CBDC until 2030, but exempted certain stablecoins.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: The Mirage of China’s Military Edge
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Malaysia to draft drone industry plan, eyes air taxi services
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Thailand's central bank keeps policy rate unchanged at 1%
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Is this teenage girl North Korea’s next dictator?
top_signals.summary: Emergence of Kim Jong Un’s daughter at many public events fuels speculation that she is being lined up as a leader

top_signals.title: The Impossibility of Perfect Fairness in Transaction Ordering
top_signals.summary: Why perfect fairness cannot hold in asynchronous networks, and how different blockchains adopt different relaxations to fairness.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Tata Electronics confirms cyberattack as hackers leak data
top_signals.summary: Tata Electronics has confirmed in a statement to BleepingComputer that it was the target of a cyberattack that impacted parts of its IT infrastructure. [...]
